Title: Login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the Login page
Steps:
1. Enter a valid username
2. Enter a valid password
3. Click the Login button
Expected: User is redirected to the Inventory page

Title: Login with empty username
Preconditions: User is on the Login page
Steps:
1. Leave the username field empty
2. Enter a valid password
3. Click the Login button
Expected: An error message is displayed and the user remains on the Login page

Title: Login with empty password
Preconditions: User is on the Login page
Steps:
1. Enter a valid username
2. Leave the password field empty
3. Click the Login button
Expected: An error message is displayed and the user remains on the Login page

Title: Login with empty username and password
Preconditions: User is on the Login page
Steps:
1. Leave the username field empty
2. Leave the password field empty
3. Click the Login button
Expected: An error message is displayed and the user remains on the Login page

Title: Login with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the Login page
Steps:
1. Enter an invalid username
2. Enter an invalid password
3. Click the Login button
Expected: An error message is displayed and the user remains on the Login page

Title: Logout from the application
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page
Steps:
1. Open the side menu
2. Click the Logout button
Expected: User is logged out and redirected to the Login page

Title: Access Inventory URL while logged out
Preconditions: User is logged out
Steps: 1. Open the Inventory page URL directly
Expected: User is redirected to the Login page

Title: Inventory page displays product list for a logged-in user
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page
Steps: 1. Verify that the product list is displayed on the Inventory page
Expected: The product list is displayed on the Inventory page

Title: Add product to cart from the Inventory page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page
Steps: 1. Click the Add to cart button for a product
Expected: The product is added to the cart and the cart badge displays "1"

Title: Remove product from cart from the Inventory page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps: 1. Click the Remove button for the added product
Expected: The product is removed from the cart and the cart badge is no longer displayed

Title: Open cart page from the cart icon
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps: 1. Click the cart icon
Expected: User is redirected to the Cart page

Title: Added product is displayed on the Cart page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Cart page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps: 1. Verify that the added product is displayed on the Cart page
Expected: The added product is displayed on the Cart page

Title: Start checkout with product in cart
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the cart page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps: 1. Click the Checkout button
Expected: User is redirected to the Checkout: Your Information page

Title: Checkout with valid customer information
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Checkout: Your Information page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps:
1. Enter a valid first name
2. Enter a valid last name
3. Enter a valid postal code
4. Click the Continue button
Expected: User is redirected to the Checkout: Overview page

Title: Checkout with empty first name
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Checkout: Your Information page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps:
1. Leave the first name field empty
2. Enter a valid last name
3. Enter a valid postal code
4. Click the Continue button
Expected: An error message "Error: First Name is required" is displayed and the user remains on the Checkout: Your Information page

Title: Checkout overview page displays order summary
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Checkout: Overview page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps: 1. Verify that the order summary is displayed on the Checkout: Overview page
Expected: The product details, payment information, shipping information, and total price are displayed on the Checkout: Overview page

Title: Complete checkout successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Checkout: Overview page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps: 1. Click the Finish button
Expected: User is redirected to the Checkout: Complete! page and the message "Thank you for your order!" is displayed

Title: Checkout with empty last name
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Checkout: Your Information page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps:
1. Enter a valid first name
2. Leave the last name field empty
3. Enter a valid postal code
4. Click the Continue button
Expected: An error message "Error: Last Name is required" is displayed and the user remains on the Checkout: Your Information page

Title: Checkout with empty postal code
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Checkout: Your Information page; a product has already been added to the cart
Steps:
1. Enter a valid first name
2. Enter a valid last name
3. Leave the postal code field empty
4. Click the Continue button
Expected: An error message "Error: Postal Code is required" is displayed and the user remains on the Checkout: Your Information page

Title: Add two products to cart from the Inventory page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page
Steps:
1. Click the Add to cart button for a product
2. Click the Add to cart button for a second product
Expected: Two products are added to the cart and the cart badge displays "2"

Title: Two added products are displayed on the Cart page
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Cart page; two products are already added to the cart
Steps: 1. Verify that the added products are displayed on the Cart page
Expected: The added products are displayed on the Cart page

Title: Sort products by name from Z to A
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page; the default sort option "Name (A to Z)" is selected
Steps: 1. Select "Name (Z to A)" from the sort dropdown
Expected: The product list is sorted by name in descending order (Z to A) on the Inventory page

Title: Sort products by price (low to high)
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page
Steps: 1. Select "Price (low to high)" from the sort dropdown
Expected: The product list is sorted by price in ascending order (low to high) on the Inventory page

Title: Sort products by price (high to low)
Preconditions: User is logged in and is on the Inventory page
Steps: 1. Select "Price (high to low)" from the sort dropdown
Expected: The product list is sorted by price in descending order (high to low) on the Inventory page
